CPE MCU - 1

This series is going to cover my journey into developing a Risc-V core.

Let’s take a look at the Risc-V register mapping

32 32-bit registers and your program counter. That’s straightforward enough.

Here are the instruction formats Source: Patterson and Hennessy, Computer Organization and Design - Risc-V Edition

Here are the Op Codes I need to implement Source: Patterson and Hennessy, Computer Organization and Design - Risc-V Edition

/cpemcu_1
